summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new testimonials and loyalty features. Both major features are working correctly with minor auth session issues in backend.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 401 when accessed without authentication
minor_bugs.impact: Auth protection not working correctly for loyalty endpoint

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 401 when accessed without authentication
minor_bugs.impact: Auth protection not working correctly for purchase history

minor_bugs.issue: Returns user data when should be unauthorized after logout

working_endpoints: GET /api/admin/testimonials - returns all testimonials for admin
GET /api/loyalty - returns loyalty points and tier info
All testimonial and loyalty business logic working correctly

passed_tests: Testimonials page loads at /depoimentos with existing testimonials
Submit testimonial button 'Compartilhe sua historia' works correctly
Testimonial form opens and accepts input (name, pet, text, rating, photo)
Testimonial submission works and shows success message
Admin can view and approve testimonials via API
Loyalty page loads at /fidelidade showing points and tier
Points balance and tier (Bronze/Prata/Ouro) display correctly
How-it-works cards show earn/redeem/tier progression info
Redeem button correctly disabled when insufficient points
Navigation 'Depoimentos' link works from main menu
User dropdown 'Meus Pontos' link works correctly
Both pages have proper responsive design and styling
API endpoints for testimonials and loyalty working correctly
Point redemption creates valid discount coupons
Testimonials display with ratings, text, and user info
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor auth session management issues: ensure /api/loyalty and /api/purchases return 401 when not authenticated, and fix session persistence after logout
